sql_array: CREATE TABLE registry_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255) NULL, value INT);
INSERT INTO registry_test (id, data, value) VALUES (1, 'alpha', 10), (2, 'beta', NULL), (3, NULL, 5);
SELECT id, registry_get(CASE WHEN data IS NULL THEN 'default' ELSE data END) AS reg_value FROM registry_test WHERE value >= 5;
SELECT id, data, value FROM registry_test WHERE value >= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registry_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, data, value FROM registry_test WHERE registry_get('var_demo') IS NULL OR (value >= 5 AND data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM registry_test GROUP BY data HAVING AVG(value) >= (SELECT AVG(value) FROM registry_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, data FROM registry_test WHERE value >= (SELECT MAX(value) FROM registry_test WHERE data IS NOT NULL) AND registry_get(data) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_registry (temp_id INT, temp_data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT tr.temp_id, rt.data, rt.value FROM temp_registry tr JOIN registry_test rt ON tr.temp_id >= rt.id WHERE rt.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CASE WHEN NULL IS NOT NULL THEN registry_get('var_error') ELSE 'Handling NULL' END AS null_check FROM registry_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registry_test WHERE registry_get(data) IS NOT NULL AND (value >= 1 OR data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, registry_get('var_demo') AS demo_value FROM registry_test WHERE registry_get(data) >= '';
